text: Would really love the ability to set a default view per project — I switch back to table view every single time I open one.

text: Please add role-based permissions at the project level, not just workspace-wide.

text: I'd love a digest of changes made by my team since I was last active — like a 'catch me up' view.

text: Please add the ability to @mention teammates in comments and have them notified.
label: feature_request

text: A Gantt chart view would let us retire another tool we currently pay for.
label: feature_request

text: We need an audit log showing who changed what and when. Essential for our compliance requirements.

text: We're a team of 3. The starter plan only allows 2 seats. We have to go to Pro just for one extra person.
label: pricing_concern

text: 4/10 on NPS — the product genuinely solves our problem but the annual pricing requires board approval at our org size. Monthly billing would help.
label: pricing_concern

text: The feature we actually need — API access — is gated behind the Enterprise tier. No pricing is listed for Enterprise. That's frustrating.
label: pricing_concern

text: I signed up for the trial and was automatically enrolled in the paid plan at the end with no confirmation email.
label: pricing_concern

text: Our contract is up for renewal and the rate increased 30% with 2 weeks notice. That's not enough time to get budget approval.
label: pricing_concern

text: Storage limits on the basic plan are too low for our use case but the jump to the next tier is 3x the price.
label: pricing_concern

text: CS note: customer wants to downgrade but the feature they rely on daily is only on Pro. They're stuck.
label: pricing_concern

text: Please publish your pricing. I've been on three calls with your sales team and still don't have a number.
label: pricing_concern

text: I'm a freelancer working with three clients. Per-seat pricing means I'd need three licenses for essentially one user.
label: pricing_concern

text: The add-on for advanced reporting costs more per month than our base plan. It should be included.
label: pricing_concern

text: We had to cancel two seats when we downsized. The refund process took 6 weeks.
label: pricing_concern

text: Your educational discount requires a .edu email. We're an accredited training organisation with a .com domain. No flexibility offered.
label: pricing_concern

text: I upgraded to annual billing to get the discount. Two weeks later you announced a new plan at a lower price point. No option to move.
label: pricing_concern

text: Getting charged for guest users who can only view, not edit. Guests shouldn't count as full seats.
label: pricing_concern

text: The trial lets you use all features but the moment you pay you discover your tier doesn't include half of them.
label: pricing_concern

text: We asked about volume pricing for 50 seats. Took 3 weeks and four emails to get a response.
label: pricing_concern

text: Startup discount programme requires a referral from a VC. Most early-stage founders don't have that.
label: pricing_concern

text: I was mid-trial and got a 'your trial expires in 1 hour' email with no option to extend.
label: pricing_concern

text: The per-workspace pricing model punishes agencies. We manage 20 client accounts — that's 20 workspaces at full price each.
label: pricing_concern

text: Invoice says 'subscription fee' with no itemisation. Our finance team needs line items to process it.
label: pricing_concern
